project.name: laravel/laravel
project.description: Laravel 13 monorepo: root skeleton, Herd/bin tooling, agent handoff docs, and seven MVP example apps (login, e-commerce, booking, FB nav clone, dashboards, invoice).
project.scopeNote: Scoped scan: MVP examples + root + docs + bin; 30k+ files excluded via .understandignore

layers.name: Tooling
layers.description: Herd-aware bin scripts and verification gates

layers.name: Documentation & Handoff
layers.description: Session state, lessons, scaffold guides, study packets

layers.name: Root Laravel API
layers.description: Passport auth + Todo REST at repo root

layers.name: MVP Examples
layers.description: Runnable Spec-Kit example apps (login, commerce, booking, dashboards)

tour.title: Session handoff
tour.description: Start every agent session from locked decisions and MVP status.

tour.title: Example factory
tour.description: Greenfield flow: new-example → Herd link → verify-example.

tour.title: Root API playground
tour.description: Passport-authenticated Todo API at monorepo root.

tour.title: MVP examples
tour.description: Independent Laravel apps with Breeze, Sanctum, Filament, or static UI.
